

* [API List](/docu/docs/API List/)
* [trx](/docu/docs/API List/trx/)
* getContract
Version: 6.3.0

On this page

# getContract [<src>](https://github.com/tronprotocol/tronweb/blob/v6.3.0/src/lib/trx.ts#L505)

Returns the details of the contract at the specified address

## Usage[​](#usage "Direct link to Usage")

```
tronWeb.trx.getContract(address);
```

## Parameters[​](#parameters "Direct link to Parameters")

| Parameters | Parameter Description | Data Type |
| --- | --- | --- |
| address | Smart Contract Address | String |

## Return[​](#return "Direct link to Return")

Object - Contract details.

## Example[​](#example "Direct link to Example")

```
await tronWeb.trx.getContract("TR7NHqjeKQxGTCi8q8ZY4pL8otSzgjLj6t");  
{  
  bytecode: ''... 21150 more characters,  
  consume_user_resource_percent: 30,  
  name: 'TetherToken',  
  origin_address: '41517591d35d313bf6a5e33098284502b045e2bc08',  
  abi: {  
    entrys: [  
      [Object], [Object], [Object], [Object],  
      [Object], [Object], [Object], [Object],  
      [Object], [Object], [Object], [Object],  
      [Object], [Object], [Object], [Object],  
      [Object], [Object], [Object], [Object],  
      [Object], [Object], [Object], [Object],  
      [Object], [Object], [Object], [Object],  
      [Object], [Object], [Object], [Object],  
      [Object], [Object], [Object], [Object],  
      [Object], [Object], [Object], [Object],  
      [Object], [Object], [Object], [Object],  
      [Object], [Object]  
    ]  
  },  
  origin_energy_limit: 10000000,  
  contract_address: '41a614f803b6fd780986a42c78ec9c7f77e6ded13c',  
  code_hash: '99bb60e56b4cd2642c6847e372b18b6e0f9514229e3086d3a042d60a4c7b78a9'  
}
```
